name: marathon-auction-server
description: Marathon Server squad auction. Requirements: Node 22.5+ (uses built-in node:sqlite). Set SESSION_SECRET (16+ chars). First boot seeds 5 users from env: ADMIN_USER, ADMIN_PASS, ZENITH_USER, ZENITH_PASS, APEX_USER, APEX_PASS, MERIDIAN_USER, MERIDIAN_PASS, HORIZON_USER, HORIZON_PASS. Optional: PORT (default 3000), SQLITE_PATH (default ./data.sqlite), INITIAL_TREASURY (default 10000), NODE_ENV=production (Secure cookies). Run: npm install && npm start. Deploy on a single VM/container with a persistent disk for the SQLite file; terminate TLS at your reverse proxy.
